topic_context.topic_summary: This topic contains rules that automate lighting based on motion detection, primarily using Philips Hue and other smart lighting systems to enhance security and convenience at entry points.

rows.if_then_rule: IF New Motion Detected from Ring THEN Toggle on/off using WeMo Light Switch.
IF New Ring Detected from Ring THEN Start recording using Arlo for 30 seconds.
